query:
I've seen this on several markown reports coming out of Unimatrix... the same finding: Finding 1 — Phase label rendered verbatim into Markdown (SEC-01, low)

stat.phase_label and phase_label from query_log.phase are written directly into Markdown table cells in render_phase.rs and render.rs without sanitization. A value containing | would break table structure; a value containing \n## could inject bogus section headings.

Mitigating factors accepted and documented in RISK-TEST-STRATEGY (SEC-01): query_log.phase is populated only by context_cycle calls from controlled protocol definitions — not directly user-supplied input. Blast radius is limited to report readability with no data loss risk. Not blocking. Genericize this to injections into markdown format, and store as lesson in Unimatrix pls

entries.title: ADR-002 col-026: cycle_ts_to_obs_millis Is Mandatory for PhaseStats Timestamp Conversion
PhaseFreqTable cold-start neutral score: absent entries return 1.0, not 0.0
ADR-002 col-031: SQL Aggregation in unimatrix-store query_log.rs Extension
Markdown injection: unsanitized data written into Markdown tables or headings
UDS Observation Log: operator-togglable debug visibility via unimatrix_server::obs target
